source.authority: Ministry of Economy and Finance of Morocco
source.scope: Official-source-backed Morocco 2026 general annual income-tax scale on caller-confirmed net taxable income.

MA.notes: General annual scale with a MAD 40,000 exempt threshold and 10%, 20%, 30%, 34% and 37% marginal bands. Net-income derivation, family reductions, specific rates, social contributions and withholding remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: 2026 general annual income tax on caller-confirmed net taxable income.
